# This file was generated by KACE (Klipper Automated Configuration Ecosystem)
# Board: 
# Kinematics: cartesian
# Stepper Drivers:  ()
# Probe: None
# Z Motors: 1

# --------------------------------------------------
# Includes
# --------------------------------------------------


# --------------------------------------------------
# MCU
# --------------------------------------------------
[mcu]
serial: /dev/serial/by-id/usb-Klipper_stm32f103xe_mock-if00 # Serial connection to the printer controller board. Auto-detected by KACE. Verify in /dev/serial/by-id/ if connection fails.

# --------------------------------------------------
# Printer
# --------------------------------------------------
[printer]
kinematics: cartesian                           # Printer kinematics type (cartesian, corexy, delta)
max_velocity: 300                               # Maximum velocity (in mm/s) of the toolhead
max_accel: 3000                                 # Maximum acceleration (in mm/s^2) of the toolhead
max_z_velocity: 5                               # Maximum velocity (in mm/s) of movement along the z axis
max_z_accel: 100                                # Maximum acceleration (in mm/s^2) of movement along the z axis

# --------------------------------------------------
# Steppers
# --------------------------------------------------
[stepper_x]
step_pin: PB13                                  # Step pin for the X stepper driver
dir_pin: !PB12                                  # Direction pin. Add or remove "!" to invert motor direction
enable_pin: !PB14                               # Enable pin for the stepper driver
microsteps: 16                                  # Number of microsteps per full step
rotation_distance: 40                           # Distance in mm the axis travels per full rotation of the motor
endstop_pin: tmc2209_stepper_x:virtual_endstop  # Endstop pin. Add or remove "!" to invert logic
position_endstop: 0                             # Location of the endstop (usually 0)
position_min: 0                                 # Minimum valid X position
position_max: 235                               # Maximum valid X position
homing_speed: 50                                # Maximum velocity (in mm/s) of the stepper when homing

[stepper_y]
step_pin: PB10                                  # Step pin for the Y stepper driver
dir_pin: !PB2                                   # Direction pin. Add or remove "!" to invert motor direction
enable_pin: !PB11                               # Enable pin for the stepper driver
microsteps: 16                                  # Number of microsteps per full step
rotation_distance: 40                           # Distance in mm the axis travels per full rotation of the motor
endstop_pin: tmc2209_stepper_y:virtual_endstop  # Endstop pin. Add or remove "!" to invert logic
position_endstop: 0                             # Location of the endstop (usually 0)
position_min: 0                                 # Minimum valid Y position
position_max: 235                               # Maximum valid Y position
homing_speed: 50                                # Maximum velocity (in mm/s) of the stepper when homing

[stepper_z]
step_pin: PB0                                   # Step pin for the Z stepper driver
dir_pin: PC5                                    # Direction pin. Add or remove "!" to invert motor direction
enable_pin: !PB1                                # Enable pin for the stepper driver
microsteps: 16                                  # Number of microsteps per full step
rotation_distance: 8                            # Distance in mm the axis travels per full rotation of the motor
endstop_pin: ^PC2                               # Endstop pin. Add or remove "!" to invert logic
position_endstop: 0.0                           # Location of the endstop (usually 0)
position_min: 0                                 # Minimum valid Z position
position_max: 250                               # Maximum valid Z position

[extruder]
step_pin: PB3                                   # Step pin for the extruder driver
dir_pin: !PB4                                   # Direction pin. Add or remove "!" to invert motor direction
enable_pin: !PD2                                # Enable pin for the stepper driver
heater_pin: PC8                                 # Pin connected to the hotend heater cartridge
sensor_pin: PA0                                 # Pin connected to the hotend thermistor
microsteps: 16                                  # Number of microsteps per full step
rotation_distance: 33.5                         # filament per motor revolution (mm) --- manual configuration --- (calibrate by extruding 100mm)
nozzle_diameter: 0.400                          # Diameter of the installed nozzle in mm
filament_diameter: 1.750                        # Diameter of the filament being used
sensor_type: EPCOS 100K B57560G104F             # Type of thermistor used for the hotend
control: pid                                    # Temperature control algorithm
pid_Kp: 22.2                                    # PID proportional --- manual configuration --- (run PID_CALIBRATE HEATER=extruder TARGET=200)
pid_Ki: 1.08                                    # PID integral --- manual configuration --- (run PID_CALIBRATE)
pid_Kd: 114                                     # PID derivative --- manual configuration --- (run PID_CALIBRATE)
min_temp: 0                                     # Minimum safe temperature
max_temp: 250                                   # Maximum safe temperature

# --------------------------------------------------
# Probe & Bed Leveling
# --------------------------------------------------

# --------------------------------------------------
# Part Cooling Fan
# --------------------------------------------------
[fan]
# pin: TODO                                     # Pin connected to the part cooling fan (uncomment and set if available)

# --------------------------------------------------
# Heated Bed
# --------------------------------------------------
[heater_bed]
heater_pin: PC9                                 # Pin connected to the heated bed solid state relay or MOSFET
sensor_pin: PC3                                 # Pin connected to the heated bed thermistor
sensor_type: EPCOS 100K B57560G104F             # Type of thermistor used for the heated bed
control: pid                                    # Temperature control algorithm
pid_Kp: 54.027                                  # bed PID proportional --- manual configuration --- (run PID_CALIBRATE HEATER=heater_bed TARGET=60)
pid_Ki: 0.770                                   # bed PID integral --- manual configuration --- (run PID_CALIBRATE)
pid_Kd: 948.182                                 # bed PID derivative --- manual configuration --- (run PID_CALIBRATE)
min_temp: 0                                     # Minimum safe temperature
max_temp: 130                                   # Maximum safe temperature

# --------------------------------------------------
# TMC Drivers
# --------------------------------------------------

# [ stepper_x]
# run_current: 0.800                            # motor current (A) --- manual configuration --- (check motor specs)
# hold_current: 0.400                           # Motor hold current in amps
# stealthchop_threshold: 999999                 # Set to 0 to use spreadCycle mode

# [ stepper_y]
# run_current: 0.800                            # motor current (A) --- manual configuration --- (check motor specs)
# hold_current: 0.400                           # Motor hold current in amps
# stealthchop_threshold: 999999                 # Set to 0 to use spreadCycle mode

# [ stepper_z]
# run_current: 0.650                            # motor current (A) --- manual configuration --- (check motor specs)
# hold_current: 0.400                           # Motor hold current in amps
# stealthchop_threshold: 999999                 # Set to 0 to use spreadCycle mode

# [ extruder]
# run_current: 0.650                            # motor current (A) --- manual configuration --- (check motor specs)
# hold_current: 0.400                           # Motor hold current in amps
# stealthchop_threshold: 999999                 # Set to 0 to use spreadCycle mode

# --------------------------------------------------
# EXP1 / EXP2 Pinout
